title: Moderation update: action on recent abuse reports
body:
We’ve processed the latest high-severity reports in the abuse queue.

- User spam_wave_42 has been banned for high-volume phishing spam across multiple channels.
- User toxic_runner has received a formal warning for targeted harassment of newcomers.
- A high-severity report against a core maintainer was reviewed and confirmed to be a false positive driven by brigading; no sanctions were applied.

Thank you to everyone who continues to report abuse responsibly. Please keep using the report tools when you see phishing, targeted harassment, or other serious violations.
